tests.test_name: Multi-file toggle is visible in the input panel
tests.feature: Multi-file mode — toggle and lock behavior
tests.description: Verifies that the multi-file toggle control is present on the Analyze page for all users.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The multi-file toggle appears in the input area of the Analyze page

tests.test_name: Multi-file toggle shows a lock icon when not logged in
tests.feature: Multi-file mode — toggle and lock behavior
tests.description: Verifies that guest users see a lock icon on the multi-file toggle, signaling the feature requires sign-in.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: A lock icon is displayed on the multi-file toggle when the user is not signed in

tests.test_name: Clicking the multi-file toggle when not logged in shows a sign-in prompt
tests.feature: Multi-file mode — toggle and lock behavior
tests.description: Verifies that guest users who attempt to enable multi-file mode are shown a sign-in prompt and the feature remains disabled.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: A 'Sign in to use multi-file mode.' message appears when an unauthenticated user clicks the toggle
Multi-file mode is not activated after the click attempt by a guest user

tests.test_name: Hovering the lock icon shows a tooltip
tests.feature: Multi-file mode — toggle and lock behavior
tests.description: Verifies that hovering over the lock icon on the multi-file toggle displays a helpful tooltip directing users to sign in.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: A 'Sign in to unlock' tooltip becomes visible when a guest user hovers over the lock icon

tests.test_name: Clicking the lock icon navigates to the login page
tests.feature: Multi-file mode — toggle and lock behavior
tests.description: Verifies that guest users are taken to the login page when they click the lock icon on the multi-file toggle.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: Clicking the lock icon redirects an unauthenticated user to the login page

tests.test_name: Open lock icon is shown when logged in and is not a link
tests.feature: Multi-file mode — toggle and lock behavior
tests.description: Verifies that signed-in users see an open lock icon on the multi-file toggle and that it does not navigate away from the page.

test_coverage.verification_step: Open lock icon for authenticated users
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The multi-file toggle shows an open lock icon when the user is signed in

test_coverage.verification_step: Open lock icon is not clickable as a link
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The open lock icon does not function as a navigation link for authenticated users

tests.test_name: Multi-file mode is disabled and queue is cleared when the user logs out
tests.feature: Multi-file mode — toggle and lock behavior
tests.description: Verifies that when a signed-in user logs out, multi-file mode is automatically turned off and any queued files are removed.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: Multi-file mode is no longer active after the user signs out and returns to the Analyze page
Any files previously added to the multi-file queue are no longer visible after logout
The multi-file toggle reverts to showing a lock icon once the user has signed out
